Project.title: Project
Project.description: User CAD projects storing procedural spec design details and thumbnails.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this project.

name.description: A customized human-readable title of the engineering CAD model.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of creation, verified by the server clock.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last revision node modification.

design.description: The complete serialized proceduralSpec structure and multi-physics metadata.

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: A session record encapsulating conversational steps and engineering dialogue logs.

name.description: Representative summary tag of the chat stream.

messages.description: Ordered history logs conforming to ChatMessage schema types.

/users/{userId}/projects/{projectId}.description: User specific durable CAD designs storage bucket.

/users/{userId}/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Secured index listing and conversation threads per user node.
